# Cynthia Stays Curated

> A travel advisor and short-term rental interior designer who combines itinerary planning with intentional rental design. Services cover Disney, Universal, cruises, national parks, beach escapes, and metropolitan getaways for travelers, plus new-build and refresh design packages for short-term rental hosts.

Cynthia Stays Curated is run by Cynthia, who offers two complementary services: (1) complimentary travel planning for families, couples, and repeat adventurers, and (2) virtual short-term rental interior design for hosts who want properties that photograph well and book consistently. All design services are offered remotely to clients across the United States.

## About

- [Homepage](https://cynthiastayscurated.com/): Overview of travel advisor and short-term rental design services
- [The Journal](https://cynthiastayscurated.com/blog): Travel guides, design reveals, and hosting insights

## Travel Services

- [Free Travel Quote](https://cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-travel.html): Request a custom travel quote for Disney, Universal, cruises, national parks, Sandals, and metropolitan trips. First quote plus two revisions are complimentary. Proposals delivered within 1–3 business days.

## Design Services

- [Free Design Consultation](https://cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-design.html): Four virtual design packages — New Property Virtual Design with Links, New Property Virtual Design + Ordering, Property Refresh Virtual Design with Links, and Property Refresh + Ordering.

## Travel Specialties

- Disney: Disney World, Disneyland, Disney Cruises
- Universal: Universal Studios Orlando, Islands of Adventure, Epic Universe
- Cruises: Royal Caribbean, Virgin Voyages, MSC
- National Parks: Zion, Grand Canyon, Big Bend
- Beach Escapes: Florida Keys, Hawaii, Sandals resorts
- Metropolitan: Nashville, Charleston, Scottsdale

## Office Hours

Monday–Thursday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST
Friday: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM CST
Weekends: closed

## Contact

Email: cynthiastayscurated@gmail.com
